examples: However, any interpretation that seeks to unify all of the novel's diverse elements is bound to be somewhat unconvincing.
Stirrups unify lance, rkier, and horse into a force capable of unprecedented violence.
By consolidating the hawks, the new alignment may also unify and perk up the doves in Israel's aviary.
My desire is to try to unify the city, not create a source of division.
For Steve Sanzillo, Monday's attack did more to unify the cities than any rivalry could divide.
